title: SC hearing on Sabarimala LIVE: Nine-judge Bench to hear pleas on religious discrimination against women
content: The Bench has said it would also examine the "scope and extent of judicial review," concerning a religious practice as referred under Article 25 of the Constitution

title: Pinarayi Vijayan’s political career timeline
content: As Kerala gears up for the crucial 2026 Assembly elections, Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan finds himself at a pivotal crossroads in his political career

title: Delhi court sends seven foreign nationals accused in terror case to 30 days judicial custody
content: According to the NIA FIR, the accused entered India on tourist visas and travelled to the Northeast without securing mandatory permits

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026 | Interviews with key candidates and political leaders
content: A collection of interviews by ‘The Hindu’ with key candidates and political leaders as part of Kerala Assembly elections 2026 coverage

title: Sabarimala review: A strict definition of ‘denomination’, ‘essential religious practices’ will compress plural and diverse Hinduism, Centre tells SC
content: Eight years ago, a majority judgment of September 2018 had rejected ‘Ayyappans’ as a religious denomination and dismissed prohibition on women aged between 10 and 50 years from entering the Sabarimala temple as an essential religious practice

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: K.K. Rema eyes a second term in Vadakara as LDF confident of a comeback
content: The incumbent MLA is contesting with UDF support again and her LDF rival is veteran socialist leader M.K. Bhaskaran. The NDA nominee is K. Dileep of the BJP

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Health sector achievements and frailties on focus
content: While the Left hails the achievements of the health sector over the past decade as unprecedented, high out of pocket expenditure, lack of adequate human resources despite improvements in infrastructure, and issues with Karunya Arogya Suraksha Padhati implementation contest the claim

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Comeback, continuity or change? Poonjar faces a three-way test
content: P.C. George, the seven-time MLA now representing the NDA, is hopeful of putting behind him the backlash he got from the Muslim community in 2021; incumbent MLA Sebastian Kulathungal of the LDF is pitching stability and steady governance; UDF’s M.J. Sebastian is betting big on anti-incumbency

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: From rallies to reels: high-stakes digital face-off for polls
content: Podcasts seem to be the most sought out tool for campaigning this time. From bigwigs like Pinarayi Vijayan to V.D. Satheesan, many candidates have given podcast interviews ahead of the polls, most of which have earned lakhs of views

title: It may not be an overwhelming win, but Congress is clearly ahead in Kerala: Shashi Tharoor
content: This election is a straight fight between LDF and UDF, says Congress leader and Thiruvananthapuram MP; BJP is a zero-seat party in Kerala Assembly and even if they get one or two or at most three seats — none of which is by any means certain — they cannot be relevant in govt. formation, he adds

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Decoding the electoral maze in Malabar
content: The 73 segments in north Kerala spread across Kasaragod, Kannur, Kozhikode, Wayanad, Malappuram, Palakkad, and Thrissur districts constitute a political mosaic where every constituency tells a different electoral story

title: 518 lakes out of 697 in J&K either disappeared or receding: CAG
content: The disappeared lakes include 80 lakes falling under the jurisdiction of the Forest Department and 235 Lakes falling under the jurisdiction of Revenue and Agriculture Department

title: Bengaluru Central RTO tops in Karnataka, ranks 3rd in India in revenue collection
content: The achievement is particularly significant given that the Bengaluru Central RTO has often been in the spotlight in the past over allegations of irregularities and scams

title: Dhanushkodi Athithan, a Congress veteran, calls for making the party a people’s movement
content: Dhanuskodi Athithan, a long-standing Congress leader and former Union Minister of State for Youth Affairs and Sport, wants the party to do field work and take up people’s issues. “Look at Tirunelveli and Kanniyakumari districts where the party is still strong. This is because of this approach,” he points out

title: Mamata chides Modi for silence over Pakistan Minister’s remark on attacking Kolkata
content: Mamata Banerjee also demanded the Prime Minister’s resignation over the Pakistan’s Defence Minister’s comment that Kolkata would be a target if there are fresh hostilities

title: From myths to language: examining the renaming of Kerala
content: The Union Government’s recent approval of the proposal to rename Kerala as Keralam prompts a re-examination of the term’s historicity, including its founding legend, the context of the United Kerala Movement, and arguments for the linguistic purity of ‘Keralam’

title: Amaravati gains legal status as capital; Andhra Pradesh leaders hail ‘historic victory’
content: Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister N. Chandrababu Naidu expressed profound gratitude to the President for her approval

title: Stall release of Tamil film TN 2026, urges a plea before Madras High Court
content: M.L. Ravi of Desiya Makkal Sakthi Katchi had filed the case claiming that the political references in the movie would have an adverse effect on Tamil Nadu Assembly elections 2026

title: The blurred line between reality and illusion: the influence of film personalities on the masses
content: Jayakanthan’s novella, “Cinemavukku Pona Chitthalu,” explores the impact of film culture on identity and social dynamics through the story of Kamsalai, a devoted admirer of Tamil cinema icon M.G. Ramachandran (MGR). Set in Chennai, the narrative captures a time when MGR’s influence shaped Tamil Nadu’s political landscape.

title: 2 children killed in bomb attack in Manipur
content: The attack happened in Bishnupur’s Moirang Tronglaobi, which has witnessed consistent gun firing at the height of ethnic conflict in 2023 and 2024

title: Sattankulam Jayaraj-Benicks custodial deaths case: All nine policemen sentenced to death
content: “Those who should protect and safeguard the public acted in such a manner and it was a case of the fence eating the crop,” says trial court judge

title: CM Patel flags ‘nation first’ ideology; BJP hits out at Kharge at foundation day event
content: Gujarat Chief Minister Bhupendra Patel urged them to remain calm and measured in their responses to rumours, highlighting the ripple effects of ongoing tensions in West Asia on the global situation

title: ED attaches ₹944-crore assets in Piyush Colonisers case
content: The properties include land parcels, flats, and commercial space located in Haryana’s Faridabad, Palwal, Rewari and Bhiwadi

title: Make details of magisterial probe into Ganderbal encounter public: Omar Abdullah
content: The Army on April 1 claimed to have killed a terrorist in Ganderbal’s Arhama forest area during a cordon and search operation

title: Bihar BJP president Sanjay Saraogi hints party will get the top post soon
content: Nitish Kumar is likely to take oath as a member of the Rajya Sabha on April 10 and would subsequently step down as Chief Minister on April 12, with a new Chief Minister from the BJP quota possibly taking oath on April 14

title: ‘Erasure of CM’ from BPF’s posters raises eyebrows in Assam
content: The possibility of losing minority votes is believed to have made the Bodoland People’s Front remove Himanta Biswa Sarma’s photo from its election campaign materials

title: High Court should have taken steps to restrain Assam Chief Minister: Hiren Gohain
content: As ‘infiltration’ makes yet another inevitable entry into the Assam campaign, the writer-civil society activist says the term ‘Miya’ was never a part of public rhetoric before

title: Assam election verdict hinges on parties reading the tea leaves right
content: Influential in at least 35 of the 126 seats in Assam, the ‘tea tribes’ have gravitated towards the BJP since 2014; the Congress is counting on the State government’s ‘failure’ to increase wages and provide ST reservation to the community

title: Three educationists rapped by Supreme Court over NCERT chapter seek hearing
content: Government informs the court about the constitution of an expert committee comprising former apex court judge Justice (retired) Indu Malhotra, senior advocate KK Venugopal and Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University vice chancellor Prakash Singh, to finalise the NCERT curriculum on Legal Studies for Class 8 and other grades.

title: ‘New’ Bangladesh-India ties will avoid ‘mistakes of the past’: Foreign Affairs Adviser Humayun Kobir
content: The Foreign Affairs Adviser to Bangladesh Prime Minister Tarique Rahman says the two sides should do more frequent exchanges at the level of political parties and officials to deal with ‘difficult issues’ so that misunderstandings are avoided.

title: Supreme Court directs CBI to probe ‘contracts awarded’ to Arunachal Pradesh CM Pema Khandu’s family
content: Petitioners alleged that there was rampant corruption, nepotism and dispensing with a transparent and open tender system in the award of contracts for 10 years between January 2015 till December 31, 2025

title: PM Modi hails BJP workers battling ‘hostile conditions’
content: Prime Minister pays tribute to workers who sacrificed their lives in line of duty; says party is addressing challenges such as demographic shifts, illegal infiltration, corruption, dynastic politics

title: In Bihar, the prohibition law has become a joke, says Tejashwi Yadav
content: Leader of Opposition in Bihar Assembly Tejashwi Yadav alleged that an illegal parallel liquor economy worth nearly ₹40,000 crore has emerged under the policy

title: Ahead of poll day, Election Commission issues directive on political advertisements
content: Individuals or contesting candidates can apply for certification of advertisements with District Media Certification and Monitoring Committee

title: Kejriwal appears in person before HC to plead change of Bench in excise case; SG terms it ‘theatrics’
content: Justice Sharma took Mr. Kejriwal's application for her recusal on record and listed it for hearing on April 13

title: NIA team reaches Malda to probe gherao of judicial officials engaged in SIR
content: The NIA has been tasked by the Election Commission to probe into the Wednesday (April 1) incident, following a directive from the Supreme Court, which has censured the West Bengal administration over the issue.

title: SC asks PMK founder Ramadoss to move HC against Chennai court order
content: Dr. Ramadoss is engaged in a dispute over the use of the party symbol by his estranged son and party president Anbumani

title: Prominent candidates file nomination papers, set out to canvass votes
content: While AIADMK’s Valarmathi filed nomination papers for Thousand Lights, DMK’s Ma. Subramanian held campaign in Saidapet

title: Familiar foes trying to recover lost ground in southern districts of T.N.
content: The AIADMK is facing a two-pronged attack from its former coordinator O. Panneerselvam and former interim general secretary V.K. Sasikala; while the former, now with the DMK, has addressed 40 meetings in the southern region, the latter, who now heads the AIPTMMK, will begin her tour today

title: Deve Gowda, HDK, Chalavadi joined hands with BJP for their own political existence, says Chief Minister Siddaramaiah
content: Chief Minister Siddaramaiah on Monday said that former Prime Minister H.D. Deve Gowda, ex chief minister H.D. Kumaraswamy and leader of opposition in legislative council Chalavadi Narayanaswamy who had openly criticised RSS and Prime Minister Narendra Modi earlier, had now joined hands with BJP just to save their existence.

title: 'The best team ever assembled': How Michigan's 'Monstars' converged for a title
content: In the year of the freshman, Dusty May led a band of transfers and upperclassmen to a national title.

title: Michigan holds off UConn to win 2nd hoops title
content: Michigan won its second national title by becoming the first team since 2009 to beat UConn in the Sweet 16 or later.

title: Hurley, Karaban reflective after UConn bows out
content: In their last game together, UConn coach Dan Hurley and Huskies star Alex Karaban saw a bid for a third national title in four years come to an end at the hands of the Michigan Wolverines, who authored a 69-63 victory at Lucas Oil Stadium on Monday night.

title: Wemby leaves Spurs' victory due to bruised rib
content: The Spurs ruled out Victor Wembanyama for the second half of Monday's win against the 76ers because of a left rib contusion.

title: Contreras warns Brewers: Hit me again, you'll pay
content: Willson Contreras had a warning for the Brewers after he was hit by a pitch for the 24th time by the team Monday. "... Next time they hit me again, I'm going to take one of them out. That's a message."

title: Grizzlies tie NBA mark for 3s with 29 but still lose
content: The Grizzlies tied the NBA single-game record with 29 3-pointers on Monday but still lost 142-126 at home to the Cavaliers.

title: Lady Vols lose recruit Edwards, see roster cut to 1
content: On the same day that Tennessee guard Jaida Civil announced she's entering the transfer portal, Oliviyah Edwards, the No. 2 recruit in the SC Next 100 class of 2026, requested a release from her national letter of intent with the Lady Volunteers on Monday.

title: Cooper irked as penalty box injury sparks probe
content: The NHL is looking into the circumstances that led to Tampa Bay Lightning forward Pontus Holmberg hurting his left arm when he crashed shoulder-first into an unlatched penalty box door in Monday night's 4-2 loss to the Buffalo Sabres at KeyBank Center.

title: Sources: UNC to hire Malone as new hoops coach
content: North Carolina intends to hire former longtime NBA coach Michael Malone as the school's next basketball coach, sources told ESPN.

title: ⚾ MLB Watchability Index: Baseball's fun teams
content: Young talent, diving catches, home runs and ... bobbleheads? Here are baseball's most exciting squads for 2026.

title: Way-Too-Early Top 25: New national champ Michigan opens at No. 1
content: The 2026 champion is crowned. We're rolling right into ranking next season's best teams -- with a few new rules.

title: What's next for UConn, Michigan after championship: Recruits, transfer portal, more
content: Here's how next season is taking shape for every team that made the final rounds of the NCAA tournament.

title: Everything that is at stake in the final week of the NBA regular season
content: NBA insiders break down lingering questions, lottery races and what to watch in the final week of the 2025-26 NBA regular season.

title: Tiger Woods isn't at Augusta this week, yet Tiger Woods is everywhere this week
content: After the recent tumult, Woods won't be in Augusta, but Masters fans still seek the ghosts of past miracle shots. There is no unwinding this tournament and Tiger.

title: Michael Malone to UNC?! How it happened, next steps for Tar Heels
content: What should Malone's top priorities be? Here are the biggest questions about the next chapter in Chapel Hill.

title: Ranking the top candidates to win the Stanley Cup after an Olympic gold medal
content: Only eight players have pulled off the feat in the same season. Who are the most likely "double champs?"

title: The Bulls clean house: Why now? What's Billy Donovan's status? What's next?
content: The Bulls fired vice president of basketball operations Arturas Karnisovas and general manager Marc Eversley on Monday. So ... what now? Here's what our insiders are hearing.

title: 'The best decision I ever made': How UCLA's roster converged to become NCAA champs
content: How a longtime coach and an eclectic mix of transfers finally delivered an NCAA title years in the making.

title: Way-Too-Early Top 25 rankings for the 2026-27 season
content: UCLA is the 2026 champion -- but unranked in the first top 25 for next season. Runner-up South Carolina is No. 3.

title: Hans Niemann plots a path from chess villain to vindication
content: Everybody heard the outlandish cheating accusations. Now Hans Niemann is ready to fight for his reputation, and a chess world championship.

title: Barcelona close on LaLiga title, Man City thrash Liverpool, more
content: Barcelona took a huge step toward winning LaLiga with a victory over Atlético, while Man City caused Liverpool more pain with an FA Cup rout for the ages. Gab Marcotti recaps the weekend.

title: MLS Power Rankings: LAFC are practically perfect atop the table
content: LAFC still hasn't conceded in league play in 2026, only a draw blemishes its record this season, but it's enough to top ESPN's MLS Power Rankings.

title: Five takeaways from NCAA regionals -- and what they mean for nationals
content: Chiles and Chio continued their superstar ways. Oklahoma, Florida and LSU dominated. After NCAA gymnastics regionals, the final eight teams are set.

title: How A.J. Terrell Jr. mentored his brother, Avieon, who's set to join the All-Pro in the NFL
content: Set to be a first-round cornerback in the NFL draft like his brother, Avieon Terrell has looked to A.J. as his inspiration throughout his life.

title: Pickups: Jeremiah Fears, Will Riley among top adds for final week
content: Here are the players who can help fill holes on your roster during the final week of the fantasy basketball season.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Barcelona, Juve lead race for Bernardo Silva
content: Manchester City midfielder Bernardo Silva is set to leave this summer and has Barcelona and Juventus on his trail. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Assembly polls in Assam disrupt life in Kerala, Karnataka and UP
content: Assam's assembly elections have triggered a significant labour shortage across India. Migrant workers returning home to vote have impacted plantation work in Kodagu, waste collection in Lucknow, and various sectors in Kerala. This exodus, driven by voting and fears over citizenship, is causing disruptions and affecting daily operations in multiple states.

title: 'Not good enough to bat at No.3 in IPL': KP's damning verdict on Rs 25.2 Cr recruit
content: Cameron Green's struggles for Kolkata Knight Riders in IPL 2026, with minimal runs and no bowling, are drawing criticism. Experts question his role at No. 3, suggesting he's a middle-order batter who bowls, not a specialist for that position. Team composition and overseas player choices are under scrutiny as KKR faces a crucial decision.

title: The Ayyappa awaits: Sabarimala supreme's sanctum nears Supreme Court's final verdict
content: ​In 2006, the Indian Young Lawyers Association approached the Supreme Court of India, arguing that barring women violated constitutional guarantees of equality and freedom of religion. By 2016, the Court began openly questioning whether such a ban could withstand constitutional scrutiny. In September 2018, a five-judge Constitution Bench delivered a 4 to 1 verdict that shook Kerala.

title: Oracle hires new CFO after layoffs; says demand for AI, cloud rising
content: Oracle has initiated a new week by appointing Hilary Maxson as its new Chief Financial Officer, following recent widespread layoffs. This move comes as the software giant invests heavily in AI infrastructure, taking on significant debt. Maxson, with extensive financial experience, aims to ensure disciplined investment for customer and shareholder value amidst Oracle's ambitious cloud and AI expansion plans.

title: Assam assembly polls: Campaigning to stop as EC enforces silence period from today
content: The Election Commission has announced the commencement of the silence period for Assam legislative assembly elections from 5:00 PM today, prohibiting all forms of campaigning, including public meetings and social media dissemination. This 48-hour period before polling on April 9 aims to ensure a free and fair electoral process, with strict compliance mandated for all stakeholders.

title: Centre doubles 5kg LPG cylinder allocation to states amid Iran war; focus on migrant workers
content: The Centre has doubled the allocation of 5-kg Free Trade LPG cylinders for migrant workers nationwide. This move, based on recent supply data, aims to ease access to cooking fuel for vulnerable sections. The government has also relaxed address proof requirements, allowing easier access for migrant workers, students, and daily wage earners.

title: Canada has changed Immigration rules; changing Visa fee, work permit rules and more
content: Canada's immigration landscape is shifting from April 2026 with passport and citizenship fee increases, offset by a 30-day processing guarantee. Super visa rules are relaxed, allowing sponsors more flexibility. Provinces gain increased autonomy in immigration assessments, while rural employers benefit from expanded foreign worker quotas.

title: ‘Dhurandhar 2’ box office day 19: Film eyes Rs 1,630 crore collection worldwide
content: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar 2' is nearing the Rs 1,630 crore worldwide box office mark, despite a significant drop on its 19th day. The film, which crossed Rs 1,000 crore domestically, collected Rs 10 crore on Monday, April 6, 2026, bringing its total to Rs 1,023.77 crore in India and Rs 1,622.72 crore globally.

title: Gang Claims US Killing: Lawrence Bishnoi group says it shot Bhanu Rana; California police confirmation awaited
content: The Lawrence Bishnoi group has claimed responsibility for the murder of gangster Bhanu Rana in California, USA, labeling him a traitor. The group's social media post, attributed to "Sarpanch Europe" and Sahil Duhan, warned of eliminating anyone working against the country and disavowed Goldy Dhillon. The message highlighted the gang's extensive international reach.

title: Doctors slam Nvidia, Anthropic CEOs as NYC Health chief says AI could replace radiologists
content: America's largest public hospital system CEO is open to replacing radiologists with AI, citing potential for "major savings" in areas like breast cancer screening. This statement follows similar claims from AI leaders, but a neuroradiologist criticizes these views as "fiction" and "ignorance," arguing AI's current impact on radiology is minimal and questioning the motives behind such pronouncements.

title: Anushka Sharma, Virat Kohli review Dhurandhar: The Revenge; praise Aditya Dhar
content: Anushka Sharma has lauded the makers of Dhurandhar: The Revenge, calling it a “fantastic” and immersive cinematic experience. Taking to Instagram Stories, Anushka penned a detailed note praising director Aditya Dhar and the film’s ensemble cast. Joining her, Virat Kohli also heaped praise on the film after watching it.

title: ‘Ek point de ditta’: Shreyas Iyer’s sister trolls KKR after washout - Watch
content: Rain halted the Kolkata Knight Riders vs. Punjab Kings match at Eden Gardens, with KKR at 25/2.  A viral reel from Shreyas Iyer's sister humorously claimed Punjab 'gifted' a point.  The washout saw Punjab top the table, while KKR opened their account but face pressure.  KKR's batting struggled early before the downpour.

title: Tata Sons' new ventures may lose up to 29,000 crore, up to 5x of FY26 estimates
content: Tata Sons' new ventures face mounting losses, with projections for FY26 reaching Rs 29,000 crore. This sharp increase has raised concerns, impacting leadership decisions. Tata Digital and Air India are major contributors to these losses. A plan to control spending is expected soon. The group is reassessing strategies for these ambitious projects.

title: Kittle linked to Cowboys move as 49ers eye $5M defensive upgrade
content: Jadeveon Clowney is a highly rated edge defender. He last played for the Dallas Cowboys. He is a potential target for the San Francisco 49ers. Their roster has injured players and the farewell of Bryce Huff. Clowney’s beyond impressive 2025 stats and PFF grades could bolster the Niners’ weakest in the league pass rush. However, he told KPRC 2 that he wants a reunion with Lamar Jackson in Baltimore.

title: Mahomes gets boost as KC Current star returns amid injury recovery
content: Patrick Mahomes and Brittany Mahomes received a timely boost as KC Current star Temwa Chawinga returned from injury. The reigning MVP’s comeback comes during a tough stretch, offering hope to end a losing streak. Her presence could quickly restore form and energy ahead of a crucial matchup against Gotham FC.

title: Rory McIlroy marriage drama deepens as book reveals divorce twist
content: Rory McIlroy’s short-lived divorce from Erica Stoll in 2024 drew huge attention, especially with Amanda Balionis rumors. A new book by Alan Shipnuck shares inside details, but confirms no affair. The couple reunited within a month, calling it a “wake-up call.” Despite personal challenges, McIlroy continues to focus on golf with family support.

title: 'Mossad agents in Iran': Do Indian GMs agree with World No. 2 Nakamura's FIDE jab?
content: Chess is grappling with a cheating crisis, forcing stringent security at top tournaments.  World No. 2 Hikaru Nakamura sarcastically compared players to spies due to intense scanning.  Indian Grandmasters like Koneru Humpy and Shyam Sundar M support these measures, emphasizing skill-based wins.  Pravin Thipsay suggests delaying live broadcasts to curb cheating, arguing popularity doesn't hinge on instant updates.

title: LPG blow hits daily wagers in NCR: Food & cash crisis forces many to go home
content: A severe LPG cylinder shortage, exacerbated by global energy supply route pressures, has forced many informal sector factory workers in NCR to leave for their native villages. The collapse of the black market for cheap, informal refills has made survival impossible for daily wage earners, leading to mass departures and hunger.

title: Stock market today: Nifty50 opens below 22,800, Sensex tumbles over 800 points
content: Dalal Street opened higher on Tuesday, with benchmark indices rising after a strong rebound in the previous session. Intense buying in banking and IT stocks, coupled with a strengthening rupee, boosted investor confidence. Global markets showed a mixed trend as oil prices climbed amid Middle East tensions.

title: Mahadev betting app returns as ‘Mahaadev’ for poll bets alongside IPL
content: The Mahadev Betting App, now rebranded as "Mahaadev," has resurfaced during the IPL, accepting bets on a wide range of events including sports and elections. Despite a previous crackdown and a new law banning online money games, the platform operates through rebranded sites and proxy links, offering a seamless betting experience.

title: Did US use F-15E rescue op as cover to seize uranium? Iran claims ‘deception mission’
content: Iran alleges a US rescue mission for a downed F-15E crew member may have been a cover to steal enriched uranium, a claim the US dismisses as a complex, intelligence-led extraction. The operation, described as daring, occurred deep inside Iranian territory amid escalating regional conflict.

title: ‘I was fed opium’: What man behind Delhi Assembly breach told cops
content: A man, Sarabjit Singh, was apprehended in Delhi after a security breach at the Assembly, claiming he was searching for his missing nephew and was given opium. His family provided psychiatric treatment documents, asserting his innocence. Police are corroborating his narrative of a road trip for prayers and the missing child.

title: RR vs MI Preview: Will Hardik Pandya play? MI skipper returns to training
content: Rajasthan Royals, on a two-match winning streak, face a Mumbai Indians side seeking consistency. Mumbai Indian anticipate the return of captain Hardik Pandya, who missed their last game due to illness. Rajasthan Royals' confident batting unit will challenge Mumbai Indians' bowling attack, setting up a clash of momentum against experience.

title: Kalpit Veerwal’s journey: Made JEE history with 360/360, then went to become a singer
content: Kalpit Veerwal, the 2017 JEE Main topper who achieved a perfect 360/360, defied expectations by not pursuing a traditional corporate career. Instead, he explored diverse interests including teaching, entrepreneurship, investing, and recently, a career as a singer-songwriter, forging his own unique path.

title: Former Bangladesh Speaker Shirin Sharmin Chowdhury arrested in Dhaka: Report
content: Former Bangladesh Parliament Speaker Shirin Sharmin Chowdhury has been arrested by Dhaka police. Officials confirmed her detention late Monday night. The specific charges remain unclear, but preliminary information suggests a link to violence during the July mass uprising. A murder complaint in Rangpur names Chowdhury and former minister Tipu Munshi. Munshi is already in custody.

title: 5-year-old boy, infant sister killed in pre-dawn rocket attack in Manipur’s Bishnupur
content: A suspected rocket attack tragically killed two young children, a five-year-old boy and his five-month-old sister, in their Manipur home early Tuesday. The explosion occurred while they slept with their mother, who sustained injuries but survived the incident.

title: Farther than ever before: Astronauts witness solar eclipse during Artemis II’s daring moon flyby
content: Artemis II astronauts achieved a historic milestone, reaching a record 252,756 miles from Earth during a lunar flyby. The crew experienced a rare solar eclipse and observed the Moon's far side. This mission marks a significant step in NASA's lunar exploration goals.

title: 'Could be taken out in one night': Trump threatens Iran; vows to jail F-15 'leak' source
content: As a 48-hour deadline for Iran approaches, President Trump warned the nation could be "taken out in one night." He detailed a complex rescue operation for two downed airmen, involving over 170 US military aircraft and facing close-range gunfire. Trump also vowed to identify a source who leaked details of the operation, citing national security concerns.

title: ‘Never ever seen anything like this’: Virat Kohli left stunned by Dhurandhar 2
content: Cricket star Virat Kohli lauded the recently released film Dhurandhar 2 as an unparalleled Indian cinematic experience, praising director Aditya Dhar and lead Ranveer Singh's brilliant performance. The blockbuster has achieved immense success, grossing over ₹1622 crore worldwide. Actor Anushka Sharma also commended the film's gripping storytelling and meticulous craftsmanship.

title: Shocking! Umpire stabbed to death over run-out decision in local cricket match
content: A local cricket umpire, Dola Ajith Babu, was tragically stabbed to death in Visakhapatnam following a dispute over a run-out decision. The incident escalated when a spectator, allegedly under the influence of alcohol, attacked Babu and another umpire after an earlier argument was settled. Babu succumbed to his injuries despite efforts to save him.

title: Oil prices rise as Trump’s Hormuz threat looms; WTI hits $113, Brent climbs to $110
content: Oil prices surged Tuesday as Middle East tensions escalated.  US President Trump issued a stern warning to Iran regarding the Strait of Hormuz, which Iran has effectively closed.  Disruptions to this vital shipping lane are impacting global crude markets, with refiners scrambling for alternatives.  Regional conflicts also continue to fuel instability.

title: Air India CEO Campbell Wilson resigns amid mounting losses
content: Air India's CEO, Campbell Wilson, has stepped down following significant losses and a slow recovery since the Tata Group's acquisition. His departure, accepted by the board, awaits a successor and the conclusion of the investigation into last year's Ahmedabad crash. Wilson's tenure, which began in July 2022, faced challenges including supply chain issues and airspace restrictions.

title: 'Difficult to keep him out of Indian team': Karthik sends message to selectors on RCB batter
content: Padikkal played a key role in RCB’s win over Chennai Super Kings on Sunday, scoring 50 off 29 balls. Speaking after the match, Karthik pointed to Padikkal’s approach at the start of the innings.

title: Bengal polls roll revision: 27 lakh ‘doubtful’ voters may lose voting rights
content: Nearly 27 lakh voters in West Bengal face exclusion from the electoral roll as their claims were rejected by judicial officers. The Supreme Court has ruled against the inclusion of names pending appeals, citing the burden on tribunals and potential chaos. Deletions now stand at 88.8 lakh, impacting 11.6% of the electorate.

title: NFL Trade Rumors: Buffalo Bills eye $132 mn Pittsburgh Steelers Star
content: The Buffalo Bills strengthened their offense by trading for DJ Moore, but questions remain about their receiving depth. With Super Bowl expectations rising, analysts suggest Buffalo could pursue DK Metcalf if he becomes available. Contract concerns and recent production have fueled trade speculation around Metcalf, though a deal is far from certain. For the Bills, adding another elite receiver could elevate Josh Allen and the offense to another level. The decision now is whether one bold move is enough, or if a second could truly push Buffalo into championship territory.

title: Army gets delivery of 'hundreds of kamikaze drones' from Gujarat firm under emergency purchase
content: An Indian drone company has supplied hundreds of kamikaze drones to the Indian Army. The Rs 10 crore contract was fulfilled rapidly. These drones are designed for harsh environments and feature automated navigation. This delivery highlights the government's focus on domestic manufacturers for precision unmanned systems.

title: Why A Multi-Crore Painting Makes Financial Sense To The Ultra-Rich
content: Art appreciates over decades, it can be stored tax-efficiently in global freeports. Also, art can be gifted across generations tax-free.

title: Trump Threatens To Bomb Iran Power Plants, Tehran Preps Human Chain Shield
content: Trump has expanded his threat against Iran to include all power plants and bridges as his ultimatum to make a deal ticked closer.

title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Iran Can Be Destroyed In 4 Hours, Trump Warns As Hormuz Deadline Nears
content: US-Iran War Live Updates: Trump's vow to attack Iran if the Strait of Hormuz is not opened by Tuesday has prompted Tehran to call him "delusional".

title: Strait Of Hormuz Closure Could Soon Be Felt On Dinner Tables Worldwide

title: Masters 2026: Ranking all 91 players in the field
content: for the first time in his career, Rory McIlroy will drive down Magnolia Lane this week as a Masters champion . a year ago, he made a 4-foot birdie putt on the 18th hole to defeat england's Justin Rose on the first hole of a sudden-death playoff . with his long-awaited Masters victory, Mcilroy became only the sixth golfer to complete the career Grand Slam .

title: Uttarakhand: LPG agency manager dies; probe on as colleagues cite 'work pressure'
